category_sources: Official Zint homepage describes barcode generation for desktop, command line, and developers.
source_facts.description says Zint is a barcode encoding library supporting over 50 symbologies.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge code page is titled Zint Barcode Generator Code.
Official homepage presents the project as Zint Barcode Generator.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge README says documentation is in docs/manual files and online at https://zint.org.uk/manual/.
Official Zint homepage links Read the manual.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge code page is the active source-control browser for the Zint project.
Official Zint homepage lists SourceForge project under Source code and marks GitHub as a mirror.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from official Zint sources.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge README says Zint and libzint encode many barcode standards and output image/vector formats.
Official homepage states Zint provides GUI, CLI, and library API barcode generation.
source_facts.description identifies barcode encoding and over 50 symbologies.
